# Errors

The OpenAPI spec reuses a small set of shared error schemas across 4xx and 5xx responses.

## Shared Error Schemas

| Schema | Description | Fields |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ApiError403` | A forbidden error returned by the API. | `status`, `message`, `code` |
| `ApiError404` | A not found error returned by the API. | `status`, `message`, `code` |
| `ApiError409` | A conflict error returned by the API. | `status`, `message`, `code` |
| `ApiError500` | An internal server error returned by the API. | `status`, `message`, `code` |
| `ApiFail422` | A processing or validation failure returned by the API. | `status` |

## Typical Error Status Codes

- `403`: authorization or access failures
- `404`: requested resource was not found
- `409`: conflict or incompatible state
- `422`: validation failures
- `500`: unexpected server failures
